title_variants: Cozy 4‑Guest Home – Save £95 vs Avg Price
Bright Olive Place – 4 Guests, 61 Nights Free
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to Olive Place, a bright, entire‑home retreat perfect for up to four guests. Priced at just £79.80 per night, this accommodation sits a remarkable 54 % below the city’s median nightly rate of £175, offering exceptional value without compromising comfort. The home has earned a solid 4.66 rating from 58 satisfied guests, reflecting consistent quality and a pleasant stay. Although you’re not yet a Superhost, host Sly brings fresh energy to the listing, with 0 years of hosting experience and a commitment to providing a seamless experience.

The property features a comfortable living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and cozy sleeping arrangements for four. Its central location (exact address omitted) puts you close to local attractions, shops, and transport links, making it an ideal base for sightseeing or business travel. Over the next 90 days, 61 nights remain open, presenting a great opportunity for travelers seeking a budget‑friendly yet well‑rated stay.

Book now to enjoy a clean, well‑maintained space at a price that undercuts the market by more than half, and experience why past guests have left glowing reviews. Olive Place combines affordability, comfort, and a prime location—your perfect home away from home.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑lit photo of the main living area or the property’s exterior as the cover image to immediately showcase space and curb appeal; follow with kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, and any outdoor area shots.
key_diagnosis: Highlight the 54 % price advantage (£79.8 vs. £175 median) in the title and description to attract price‑sensitive travelers and improve click‑through rates.
Add the three high‑value amenities (outdoor area, parking, entertainment) that are currently missing, addressing a clear gap and boosting perceived value.
Upload a full set of professional photos covering living room, kitchen, bedrooms, bathroom, and exterior to replace the unknown current image set and increase conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate of £79.8 is 54 % lower than the market median of £175, yet you have 61 open nights in the next 90 days—there’s huge upside by promoting that savings.
